# Love Mallacoota

> Local directory and visitor guide for Mallacoota, Victoria, Australia (East
> Gippsland, postcode 3892). Curated, locally maintained listings of places to
> eat and drink, places to stay, and things to do, plus a community events
> calendar. Run by Colin Dixon (oze.au). Content is factual business data:
> names, descriptions, categories, addresses, phone numbers, links, and
> geo-coordinates.

Mallacoota is a coastal town at the Mallacoota Inlet, roughly 520 km east of
Melbourne and 550 km south of Sydney, bordered by Croajingolong National Park.

## Pages

- [Home](https://lovemallacoota.com.au/): overview, video, and map
- [Eat & Drink](https://lovemallacoota.com.au/food.html): cafes, restaurants, pubs, takeaway, and seafood
- [Stay](https://lovemallacoota.com.au/accom.html): lodges, motels, holiday houses, and caravan parks
- [Do & See](https://lovemallacoota.com.au/activity.html): boat hire, tours, galleries, shops, and attractions
- [Community Calendar](https://lovemallacoota.com.au/calendar.html): markets, meetups, and local events
- [Contact](https://lovemallacoota.com.au/contact.html): suggest a listing correction or addition

## Data

Structured listing data (JSON, schema.org-aligned fields: business_name,
category_tags, description, address, geo, phone, links, opening_hours):

- [Eat & Drink listings](https://lovemallacoota.com.au/data/listings_food.json)
- [Accommodation listings](https://lovemallacoota.com.au/data/listings_accom.json)
- [Activity listings](https://lovemallacoota.com.au/data/listings_do.json)
- [Other listings](https://lovemallacoota.com.au/data/listings_other.json)

## Related sites

- [oze.au](https://oze.au): parent business hub
- [coota.au](https://coota.au): sibling Mallacoota site
